description: A plain candid news/scene photograph (no graphic overlay or on-image text) documenting a vehicle collision on a snowy residential street. A silver SUV at left is angled into a black SUV at center whose front end is heavily damaged and crumpled, with a wheel and bumper torn out of place; the front of another dark vehicle is visible at the lower right. The street and yards are covered in dirty snow/ice; suburban houses, leafless winter trees, and evergreens are in the background under an overcast sky. This corresponds to the tweet's account of a criminal illegal alien allegedly ramming an ICE vehicle and striking a civilian car in St. Paul, MN. It is a documentary scene photo, not a designed meme or poster.
